If born in the second Hora of Pisces, one will be liberal, will have an elevated nose, be skillful,
intelligent, will possess charming eyes be dear to king and will speak affably.
25. The (good effects) due to a Hora will come to pass in full measure, if either the Sun, or the
Moon is strong in aspect to the Ascendant Lord, or, if the Ascendant Lord is himself in an
Angle.
Thus ends the 49th Ch. entitled EFFECTS OF HORAS (lost horoscopy) in Kalyana Varmas
SARAVALI.
Chapter 50.
Effects Of Decanates
1-3. DECANATES IN ARIES.
One born in the first decanate of Aries will be charitable, be a thief, be splendourous, will have
checkered prosperity, be fierce in battle (or in quarrels), pleasing in appearance and will inflict
punishment on relatives.
If born in the second decanate of Aries, he will be attached to females, will wander, be interested
